name: 宙斯x27电击枪 | 充电宝
nameZh: 宙斯x27电击枪 | 充电宝
descriptionEn: Perfect for close-range ambushes and enclosed area encounters, the rechargeable x27 Zeus is capable of incapacitating an enemy in a single hit. It has been custom painted with a yellow base and finished with black and red accents. WARNING: BRIGHT LIGHT, AVOID EXPOSURE
descriptionZh: 非常适合用在近距离伏击和狭路相逢的情况下，可充电的宙斯x27电击枪能将敌人一击致命。 它采用了黄色底漆搭配黑红撞色的定制涂装。 警告：高能危险，请勿接触
